_readme: Official OWCS calendar — EVENT-LEVEL source (Roadmap Phase B3).
This is the official-schedule adapter's data: competition dates, regional
stage windows, major-event dates and official broadcast destinations. It
is used to RECONCILE against FACEIT match facts (B4) — it never supplies
compositions and never silently overwrites FACEIT. When FACEIT and this
calendar disagree (e.g. start times), reconciliation raises a warning; a
Entries here are a committed SEED/TEMPLATE for the 2026 season structure
(regional stages + global live events). Dates are placeholders marked
`verified: false` until confirmed against the official Overwatch Esports
schedule. `faceitCompetitionId` links an event to a registry competition
in config/faceit_competitions.json; a null link is exactly what B4 flags
as 'official event without a known FACEIT competition'.
No credentials, no scraping secrets — this file is committed so CI and
offline reconciliation run without network access.
